title: PM-Kisan Samman Nidhi
description: Financial assistance to all landholding farmer families to take care of agricultural and domestic needs.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in three installments.

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance scheme for financial support against crop loss due to natural calamities.
benefits: Low premium insurance for all food and oilseed crops.

title: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Providing adequate and timely credit support from the banking system.
benefits: Short-term credit for cultivation and maintenance of assets.

title: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides soil health reports and fertilizer recommendations.
benefits: Detailed report on soil nutrients and fertilizer advice.

title: PM Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
description: Improving water-use efficiency and expanding irrigation coverage.
benefits: Subsidies for drip and sprinkler irrigation systems.

title: E-NAM (National Agriculture Market)
description: Pan-India electronic trading portal for agricultural commodities.
benefits: Better price discovery and online trading platform.

title: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Promotion of organic farming and improving soil health.
benefits: Support for organic clusters and certification.

title: PM-KISAN Maandhan Yojana
description: Pension scheme for small and marginal farmers.
benefits: Minimum assured pension of ₹3,000 per month after age 60.

title: Agri-Infrastructure Fund
description: Financing facility for post-harvest management infrastructure.
benefits: Interest subvention and credit guarantee for infra projects.

title: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana
description: Focused development of the fisheries sector.
benefits: Support for fish production and infrastructure.

title: PM-AASHA
description: Ensuring remunerative prices to farmers for their produce.
benefits: Price support and deficiency payment for pulses/oilseeds.

title: National Food Security Mission
description: Increasing production of rice, wheat, and pulses through area expansion.
benefits: Subsidies on seeds, technology, and machinery.

title: Micro Irrigation Fund
description: Facilitating states in mobilizing resources for expanding micro-irrigation.
benefits: Low-interest loans for micro-irrigation hardware.

title: Mission for Integrated Development of Horticulture
description: Holistic growth of the horticulture sector.
benefits: Technical support and subsidies for fruit/vegetable farming.

title: Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan (PM-KUSUM)
description: Helping farmers install solar pumps and grid-connected solar plants.
benefits: Renewable energy and additional income from solar power.

title: Raitha Vidyanidhi Scholarship
description: Scholarship for children of farmers to pursue higher education.
benefits: Annual scholarship of ₹2,000 to ₹11,000.

title: Krishi Bhagya
description: Livelihood improvement of rainfed farmers.
benefits: Subsidy for farm ponds, lining, and sprinklers.

title: Pashu Bhagya
description: Assistance for purchasing quality livestock.
benefits: Back-end subsidy and interest-free loans for cattle/sheep.

title: Milk Incentive Scheme
description: Incentive for milk producers through co-operative societies.
benefits: ₹5 per litre incentive directly to milk producers.

title: Ganga Kalyana Scheme
description: Free borewells for small/marginal farmers from backward classes.
benefits: Free borewell drilling and pump installation.

title: Raitha Siri
description: Encouraging millet cultivation among state farmers.
benefits: Incentive of ₹10,000 per hectare for millet growers.

title: Krushi Aranya Protsaha Yojane
description: Assistance for planting seedlings on farm bunds.
benefits: ₹100 to ₹125 incentive per tree surviving for 3 years.

title: Surya Raitha
description: Solar pumpsets for farmers with surplus power sales.
benefits: Installation of 10HP solar pumps with grid connection.

title: Raitha Sanjeevini (Accident Insurance)
description: Ex-gratia payment to farmers in case of accidental death during farm work.
benefits: Compensation up to ₹2 lakh for the family.

title: Krishi Yantra Dhare
description: Custom hiring centers for farm machinery.
benefits: Access to expensive machinery at low rental prices.

title: Savayava Bhagya
description: Promotion of organic farming through cluster development.
benefits: Training and subsidies for organic inputs.

title: Krishi Navodyama
description: Promoting agri-startups and innovation in the state.
benefits: Grants and incubation support for agri-tech startups.

title: Bhoo Chetana
description: Soil health enhancement through nutrient management.
benefits: Distribution of micro-nutrients and soil testing.

title: Suvarna Gramodaya
description: Holistic development of selected villages.
benefits: Infrastructure and livelihood support in rural clusters.

title: Karnataka State Agriculture Marketing Board Loans
description: Pledge loans against agricultural produce.
benefits: Advance against stored produce to avoid distress sale.
